en: Mmm. Tootski. No, no, thank you, no. What's this?
What can I bring for you on this glorious afternoon? Well, Hector, here's the game plan. You're gonna bring us two absolute martinis.
ko: 이 멋진 오후에 뭘 가져다드릴까요? 헥터, 계획은 이래. 앱솔루트 마티니 두 잔 가져와.

en: You know how I like them, straight up. And then precisely seven and one-half minutes after that, you're gonna bring us two more.
ko: 내가 좋아하는 거 알지, 스트레이트 업. 정확히 7분 반 후에 두 잔 더.

en: Then two more after that every five minutes until one of us passes the fuck out.
ko: 그 뒤로 5분마다 둘 중 하나가 뻗을 때까지 두 잔씩.

en: Excellent strategy, sir. I'm good with water for now, though. Thank you. It's his first day on Wall Street.
ko: 훌륭한 전략이시네요. 저는 물로 할게요. 고마워요. 월스트리트 첫날이거든요.

en: Give him time. Thank you. Mm-hmm. Thank you.
Mr. Hanna, you're able to do drugs during the day and still function, still do your job.
ko: 하나 씨, 낮에 약을 하면서도 기능하고 일할 수 있는 거예요.

en: Well, how the fuck else would you do this job? Cocaine and hookers, my friend. Right.
ko: 안 그러면 이 일을 어떻게 해? 코카인이랑 매춘부야, 친구. 맞아.

en: I gotta say, I'm incredibly excited to be a part of your firm. I mean, the clients you have are absolutely... Fuck the clients.
ko: 솔직히 당신 회사의 일원이 되어 엄청 흥분돼요. 고객들이 정말... 고객은 됐어.

en: Your only responsibility is to put meat on the table. You got a girlfriend?
ko: 네 유일한 책임은 돈을 벌어오는 거야. 여자친구 있어?

en: I'm married. I have no wife right now.
